title: 'parameter type' data type bit width changes unexpectedly

features.name: parameterized struct type passed through module hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a struct type passed as a parameter type through multiple levels of module instantiation

features.name: parameter type used in module port
features.description: Code should include a parameterized type used as a module port direction or signal

features.name: parameterized struct width calculation
features.description: Code should include a packed struct used as a type parameter where the struct width must be correctly computed
